% check a.php
a.php:5:2: $s is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:9:1: $i is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:8:4: $t is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

% check e.php
e.php:4:1: $arr is of type: array (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:4:1: $keys is of type: array (DEBUG)
d.php:7:1: $len is of type: int (DEBUG)
d.php:10:1: $lower is of type: string (DEBUG)
d.php:13:1: $ok is of type: bool (DEBUG)
d.php:16:1: $x is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

function convert(string $s): int
{
	#debugType $s
}

$i = convert('three');
#debugType $i
% check c.php
# No errors.

-- c.php --
<?php

class Fruit
{
	public string $name;
}

/** @var Fruit $d */

$items = array_map(fn($d) => $d->getDate(), []);
-- b.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	function bar()
	{
		(function($t) {
			#debugType $t
		})();
	}
}
-- d.php --
<?php

$keys = array_keys([1, 2, 3]);
#debugType $keys

$len = strlen('hello');
#debugType $len

$lower = strtolower('HELLO');
#debugType $lower

$ok = in_array('a', []);
#debugType $ok

$x = some_unknown_func();
#debugType $x
-- e.php --
<?php

$arr = [-1, 0, 1];
#debugType $arr

foreach ([1, 2, 3] as $i) {
}
